cells.rationale: Separating observation timeout from lifecycle termination while preserving envelope and reap semantics is a subtle cross-file correctness invariant.
Causal transcript attribution, exact process identity, concurrency exclusion, and ambiguous-delivery handling form a subtle correctness-critical architectural change.
